sales-lead-tracker.description: Lead management, follow-up reminders, and deal stage board

hr-onboarding.name: Onboarding System
hr-onboarding.description: New hire onboarding workflow, document checklist, and training schedule

marketing-campaign.name: Campaign Manager
marketing-campaign.description: Campaign planning, budget allocation, performance tracking, and ROI analysis

marketing-content-calendar.name: Content Calendar
marketing-content-calendar.description: Social post scheduling, content review workflow, and multi-platform publishing

pm-task-board.name: Task Board
pm-task-board.description: Task creation and assignment, board view, progress tracking, and milestones

pm-meeting-notes.name: Meeting Notes
pm-meeting-notes.description: Meeting minutes, action item tracking, and decision archiving

it-helpdesk.name: IT Helpdesk
it-helpdesk.description: IT issue reporting, ticket assignment, progress tracking, and knowledge base

ops-inventory.description: Real-time inventory lookup, stock-in/out records, and low-stock alerts

linebot-payment-notify.description: Accounts receivable/payable due reminders, payment confirmations, and overdue collection alerts

linebot-contract-alert.description: Auto contract expiry reminders, renewal notifications, and important legal matter alerts

linebot-customer-service.description: Auto-reply to common questions, hand off to live agents, and conversation log management

linebot-ecommerce.name: LINE E-Commerce Bot
linebot-ecommerce.description: Product browsing, cart management, checkout, and order inquiry all-in-one

linebot-order-tracking.name: LINE Order Tracking Bot
linebot-order-tracking.description: Real-time logistics status, delivery progress, and estimated arrival by order number

linebot-leave.name: LINE Leave Request Bot
linebot-leave.description: Submit leave requests via LINE, check leave balance, and instant manager approval notifications

linebot-member-card.name: LINE Member Card Bot
linebot-member-card.description: Digital membership card, points earning/redemption, tier lookup, and exclusive offers

linebot-survey.name: LINE Survey Bot
linebot-survey.description: Interactive surveys, satisfaction rating collection, and real-time result statistics

linebot-notification.name: LINE Notification Bot
linebot-notification.description: Push task progress, meeting reminders, system alerts, and scheduled messages

linebot-faq.name: LINE FAQ Bot
linebot-faq.description: Keyword-matched auto answers for FAQs with rich menus and quick reply support

linebot-booking.name: LINE Booking Bot
linebot-booking.description: Online slot lookup, booking confirmation notifications, and reschedule/cancel handling

realestate-client-matching.name: Client Matching System
realestate-client-matching.description: Register buyer/renter requirements, match properties by criteria, and track viewing feedback

realestate-commission.description: Calculate deal commissions, manage agent share ratios, and track payment status

realestate-owner-negotiation.name: Owner Negotiation Manager
realestate-owner-negotiation.description: Track owner meetings, compare asking price vs market value, and manage listing progress

linebot-property-inquiry.description: Property search notifications, viewing appointments, and agent contact features
